ai_ml_engineer.body:
Hi {recruiter_name},

I recently applied for the {job_role} role at {company_name} and wanted to reach out to express my interest.

My background focuses on building machine learning systems and deploying them in real world environments. I have worked on LLM pipelines, computer vision models, and scalable ML services that combine data, infrastructure, and model deployment.

I enjoy taking models from experimentation to production and building reliable systems around them.

I would love the opportunity to connect and learn more about the role.

LinkedIn - https://www.linkedin.com/in/vaishnavi-bhalodi-328246209/

Best regards,
{sender_name}

startup_engineer.body:
Hi {recruiter_name},

I recently applied for the {job_role} role at {company_name} and wanted to reach out because this is exactly the type of opportunity I am looking for.

I am very comfortable working in startup environments. I understand that building a generational company requires ownership, resilience, and long hours, and that is the type of environment where I do my best work. I enjoy taking responsibility, moving quickly, and solving difficult problems across systems and products.

I am actively looking for opportunities where I can contribute wherever the company needs most. I learn quickly, adapt fast, and care deeply about helping the company succeed.

Regarding sponsorship, while I may require it in the future, I am open to contract based work or arrangements without sponsorship for the next three years.

I am not just looking for a job. I am looking to help build something meaningful.

LinkedIn - https://www.linkedin.com/in/vaishnavi-bhalodi-328246209/

Best regards,
{sender_name}
